label: Azure OpenAI
description: Send a prompt through Azure OpenAI via the platform's OpenAI-compatible chat-completion endpoint (provider:'azure_openai').

settings.name: model
settings.label: Model / deployment
settings.description: Leave blank to use deploymentName, then AIF_MODEL env. No literal model strings — env or platform decides.

settings.name: deploymentName
settings.label: Azure deployment name
settings.description: Used as the model name when 'model' is unset. Overridden by AIF_MODEL env if both are unset.

ai.whenToUse: When the user explicitly wants Azure-routed inference.
ai.examplePrompt: use Azure OpenAI to extract entities and return JSON
ai.promptHints: Reference the response with {{steps.<id>.content}}. Set deploymentName to override the env default; leave model blank.

outputAssertions.name: non_empty_content
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Azure OpenAI returned an empty completion — usually a provider/deployment issue or content-filter rejection.
